title: Implement URL Shortener REST API in Go

steps.description: Define domain entities and value objects for URL shortening logic.
steps.done_condition: Domain entities are defined and validated through tests.

steps.description: Define ports for the URL shortener service.
steps.done_condition: Ports for URL shortening are defined.

steps.description: Implement the HTTP server interface for short URL creation and retrieval.
steps.done_condition: HTTP server is up and running, handling basic requests.

steps.description: Set up in-memory storage for URL management.
steps.done_condition: In-memory storage is integrated and operational.

steps.description: Implement use cases for creating and retrieving shortened URLs.
steps.done_condition: Use cases are implemented and passing tests.

steps.description: Set up integration tests to validate the complete URL shortener functionality.

mergeOrder: Finally merge use cases and integration tests
successCriteria: API can retrieve original URLs by shortened version
All features are tested and validated
